title: Figure 5 from: Karimi O, Afshari N, Asghari R, Li Q, Chethana KWT, Hyde KD, Alotibi FO (2024) Novel discoveries of Xylariomycetidae (Ascomycota) taxa from peat swamp forests and other terrestrial habitats in Thailand. MycoKeys 107: 219-247. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.107.127749
author: Karimi, Omid
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5 Hypoxylon hypomiltum (MFLU 24-0043, new host and geographical record) a host b stromatal habit on host c stromata in vertical section showing perithecia d, e asci f pigments in KOH g ascal apical apparatus in Melzer's reagent h-i ascospore (i ascospore with perispore j ascospore with germ slit) k germinated ascospore l colony on PDA after three weeks. Scale bars: 500 µm (b, c); 20 µm (d, e); 5 µm (g-j); 10 µm (k).
